# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud compute security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data - secure configuration

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - m5.large
      - m5.xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type

  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI

  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC to deploy instances into

  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet to deploy instances into

  KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 Key Pair for SSH access

  DataVolumeSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 20
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: Size of the data EBS volume in GB

  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development

  BackupRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 7
    MaxValue: 365
    Description: Number of days to retain EBS snapshots

Resources:

  EBSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for EBS volume encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowEC2Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt EC2InstanceRole.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  EBSEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub alias/${AWS::StackName}-ebs-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EBSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeVolumes
                  - ec2:AttachVolume
                  - ec2:DetachVolume
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceTag/Environment: !Ref Environment

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/8
          Description: HTTPS from internal network
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTPS outbound for updates and API calls
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTP outbound for package updates
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-sg
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  AppInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Metadata:
      AWS::CloudFormation::Init:
        config:
          commands:
            01_mount_data_volume:
              command: |
                mkfs -t xfs /dev/xvdf || true
                mkdir -p /data
                mount /dev/xvdf /data
                echo '/dev/xvdf /data xfs defaults,nofail 0 2' >> /etc/fstab
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      DisableApiTermination: true
      Monitoring: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -xe
          yum update -y
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-init -v --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AppInstance1 --region ${AWS::Region}
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AppInstance1 --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-app-instance-1
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  DataVolume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Snapshot
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-data-volume-1
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  DataVolume1Attachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/xvdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance1
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume1

  AppInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Metadata:
      AWS::CloudFormation::Init:
        config:
          commands:
            01_mount_data_volume:
              command: |
                mkfs -t xfs /dev/xvdf || true
                mkdir -p /data
                mount /dev/xvdf /data
                echo '/dev/xvdf /data xfs defaults,nofail 0 2' >> /etc/fstab
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      DisableApiTermination: true
      Monitoring: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -xe
          yum update -y
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-init -v --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AppInstance2 --region ${AWS::Region}
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AppInstance2 --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-app-instance-2
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  DataVolume2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Snapshot
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-data-volume-2
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  DataVolume2Attachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/xvdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance2
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume2

  BackupVault:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupVault
    Properties:
      BackupVaultName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-backup-vault
      EncryptionKeyArn: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn

  BackupPlan:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupPlan
    Properties:
      BackupPlan:
        BackupPlanName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-backup-plan
        BackupPlanRule:
          - RuleName: DailyBackup
            TargetBackupVault: !Ref BackupVault
            ScheduleExpression: cron(0 3 * * ? *)
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 180
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: !Ref BackupRetentionDays

  BackupRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForBackup
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForRestores

  BackupSelection:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupSelection
    Properties:
      BackupPlanId: !Ref BackupPlan
      BackupSelection:
        SelectionName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-backup-selection
        IamRoleArn: !GetAtt BackupRole.Arn
        ListOfTags:
          - ConditionType: STRINGEQUALS
            ConditionKey: Backup
            ConditionValue: 'true'

Outputs:
  Instance1Id:
    Description: Instance ID of App Instance 1
    Value: !Ref AppInstance1

  Instance2Id:
    Description: Instance ID of App Instance 2
    Value: !Ref AppInstance2

  DataVolume1Id:
    Description: Volume ID of Data Volume 1
    Value: !Ref DataVolume1

  DataVolume2Id:
    Description: Volume ID of Data Volume 2
    Value: !Ref DataVolume2

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for EBS encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn

  BackupVaultArn:
    Description: ARN of the backup vault
    Value: !GetAtt BackupVault.BackupVaultArn
